chunks.title: Search for the Righteous and Judgment on Jerusalem
chunks.reason: A unified speech unit where God commands a search for justice, describes the people's stubbornness, and pronounces judgment using animal imagery.

chunks.title: Oracle of Adultery and Divine Retribution
chunks.reason: A continuous oracle detailing Israel's spiritual adultery, the futility of their prophets, and God's declaration to make His words fire against them.

chunks.title: The Northern Enemy and the Lesson of Exile
chunks.reason: A speech describing the invading nation from afar and providing a theological explanation for their exile as a consequence of forsaking God.

chunks.title: Exhortation to Fear the Creator
chunks.reason: An exhortation calling the people to recognize God's power in nature and warning that their sins have withheld His blessings.

chunks.title: The Fowlers and the False Prophets
chunks.reason: A mixed unit combining a metaphor of wicked men as fowlers with a final indictment of corrupt priests and prophets.
